pr_text:
## Title: Add proper error logging for SIGTERM/SIGINT shutdown handler

### Summary
The `catch_sigterm()` signal handler in the ITTI (Inter-Task Interface) component currently only writes a plain text message to stdout when SIGTERM or SIGINT is received. This approach bypasses the centralized logging infrastructure, making shutdown events invisible to production logging systems that rely on severity levels, timestamps, and structured formatting for debugging and monitoring.
